sourceNote: Magic Collector Booster (12-pack box, ~15 cards/pack). Unlike the Play Booster, a Collector Booster is all-foil and its rare/mythic slots pull the SPECIAL TREATMENTS — showcase, borderless, extended-art — which is where the value sits. This table's card pool is every rare/mythic PRINT of the set at its foil price (via Scryfall), treatments included; serialized (1/500) inserts and ultra-chases over $500 are excluded because they pull at far below the standard rate and would dominate the mean. Modelled as ~2 rares + ~0.7 mythic per pack: a Collector pack actually yields ~4 rare/mythic, but the flat foil pool over-weights the pricier treatment prints, so the per-pack count is set conservatively to compensate (and disclosed as such). Uniform-within-rarity, so a specific expensive borderless is overstated. Confidence LOW — a rough, indicative Collector EV calibrated against street box prices, not a precise per-slot model.
